case_title: RICHARD BARTHOLOMEW SWEENEY VS. UNIVERSITY OF SAN FRANCISCO, SCHOOL OF BUSINESS -

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $7,500.00 FILED BY SWEENEY, RICHARD BARTHOLOMEW AS TO DEFENDANT UNIVERSITY OF SAN FRANCISCO, SCHOOL OF BUSINESS - & PROFESSIONAL STUDIES ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-26-2010 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED FEE CHARGED $30.00 SERVED SEP-08-2010, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON CORPORATION AS TO DEFENDANT UNIVERSITY OF SAN FRANCISCO, SCHOOL OF BUSINESS - & PROFESSIONAL STUDIES

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF OCT-26-2010 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF OCT-26-2010 BY PAUL SLAVIT. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT. PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT EXHIBITS RETAINED. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT UNIVERSITY OF SAN FRANCISCO, SCHOOL OF BUSINESS - & PROFESSIONAL STUDIES
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF OCT-26-2010 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SWEENEY, RICHARD BARTHOLOMEW IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT UNIVERSITY OF SAN FRANCISCO, SCHOOL OF BUSINESS - & PROFESSIONAL STUDIES STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
